From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Saint Benedict Joseph Labre Parish](/w/index.php?title=Saint_Benedict_Joseph_Labre_Parish&redirect=no "Saint Benedict Joseph Labre Parish"))

Historic church in New York, United States

**Saint Benedict Joseph Labre Parish** is a historic [Roman Catholic](/wiki/Catholic_Church "Catholic Church") [parish church](/wiki/Parish_(Catholic_Church) "Parish (Catholic Church)") complex in the [Diocese of Brooklyn](/wiki/Roman_Catholic_Diocese_of_Brooklyn "Roman Catholic Diocese of Brooklyn"), located at 94-40 118th Street in [Richmond Hill](/wiki/Richmond_Hill,_Queens "Richmond Hill, Queens"), [Queens](/wiki/Queens "Queens"), [New York City](/wiki/New_York_City "New York City").

## Description

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Saint_Benedict_Joseph_Labre_Church_(Queens)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Description")]

The complex consists of the church, [rectory](/wiki/Rectory "Rectory") / parsonage, school, and [cloister](/wiki/Cloister "Cloister"). The church was designed in 1916 by architect [Thomas Henry Poole](/wiki/Thomas_Henry_Poole "Thomas Henry Poole") (1860–1919) and completed in 1919. It is a large brick [Romanesque](/wiki/Romanesque_Revival_architecture "Romanesque Revival architecture")-style building in the [basilican](/wiki/Basilica "Basilica") plan. It features a standing seam [copper](/wiki/Copper "Copper")-roofed [dome](/wiki/Dome "Dome") and a [bell tower](/wiki/Bell_tower "Bell tower"). The rectory is a 2+1⁄2-story brick building built in 1939. The cloister also dates to 1939 and connects the rectory to the [sanctuary](/wiki/Sanctuary "Sanctuary"). It features a 1938 statue of the patron [Saint Benedict Joseph Labre](/wiki/Benedict_Joseph_Labre "Benedict Joseph Labre"). The brick school building was built in 1912 and substantially enlarged in 1938–1939.[[2]](#cite_note-nrhpdoc-2)

It was listed on the [National Register of Historic Places](/wiki/National_Register_of_Historic_Places "National Register of Historic Places") in 2007.[[1]](#cite_note-nris-1)
